utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each of the first three requires 'insurance with costs'—the plan provides a plan name/description and a specific monthly cost for health (€330/month), property (€140/month), and travel (€110/month), so they are fully specified. Additional_services requires 'any enhancement services with costs'—the plan lists included services and states 'Included in package costs,' which qualifies as a cost specification. Total_budget requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—both monthly (€580) and annual (€6,960) are provided. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named plans: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage & ProSecure Liability Plan (property), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel). From the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 2. EliteTravel Premium Plan appears under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 2. For property, EliteHome Premium Coverage exists with rating 2; there is no 'ProSecure Liability Plan' in the ground-truth list, so only the identifiable 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' can be mapped. Additional services are generic and not mapped to any rated item.
